allow: Bash(node -e 'const j = JSON.parse\(require\('\\''fs'\\''\).readFileSync\('\\''src/styles/tokens/raw.colors.tokens.json'\\''\)\); const needed = ['\\''neutral'\\'','\\''red'\\'','\\''amber'\\'','\\''green'\\'']; needed.forEach\(k => { const ramp = j[k]; if \(ramp\) { Object.entries\(ramp\).forEach\(\([stop, v]\) => console.log\(k+'\\''/'\\''+stop+'\\'':'\\'', v['\\''$value'\\''].hex\)\); } }\); console.log\('\\''white:'\\'', j.white['\\''$value'\\''].hex\); console.log\('\\''black:'\\'', j.black['\\''$value'\\''].hex\);')
